23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @GarrisonFjord drew this and I think it's delightful. Check out their other posts for more great stuff.
27 Man Tax: Tom Holland
“I don't think the thing is to be well known, but being worth knowing.” Robert Fulghum So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 ***Also if you miss abbiistabbii's discord community good news! Here's the new one https://discord.gg/NPStJGgARq - where everyone's reconnecting, shitposting, and hanging out again*** https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: He's obviously still in morning... He's wearing his funeral Hat still...
item.description: Edit: For context this is a picture of trump golfing this weekend after attending a funeral for troops he sent off to be murdered. He is wearing the same baseball cap merch he wore to the funeral

item.title: The cost of War is why we can't have nice things

item.title: Fun times at wherever High
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
Am i a mouse?
Dumb baby
I hate him anyway
Are we all dragons?
Old mlp were for kids too
How the world views America. I think it’s hilarious
She’s awesome
Chocolate
My sister
Hee hee
Every new series is like a fan fic
I love this
Accurate
No cat left behind
Orange cats are crazy
Aw
My cat did this yesterday
Have done this
Accurate
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake

item.title: Walking the dog.

item.title: Machines are only as smart as the people who created them. That's either going to screw us or save us.
item.description: Caitlin Kalinowski, who served as a member of technical staff focused on robotics and hardware, posted on social media that she had stepped down on "principle" after the company revealed plans to make its AI systems available inside secure Defense Department computing systems. She said policy guardrails around certain AI uses were not sufficiently defined before OpenAI announced an agreement with the Pentagon. "AI has an important role in national security," Kalinowski wrote. "But surveillance of Americans without judicial oversight and lethal autonomy without human authorization are lines that deserved more deliberation than they got." https://www.npr.org/2026/03/08/nx-s1-5741779/openai-resigns-ai-pentagon-guardrails-military
item.dc:creator: azazyel

item.title: Things I found funny this week
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or needing to read something before falling asleep, you’ll love following this page!
Grandma is spitting truths
Kinda late, but I thought it was funny
I love this idea
Never have had to do this
My eye is connected to my ears
True fact
Don’t believe in anything or everyone will attack you
Figured this out quick
I will stab you
Thanks.
Rip to old memes
I’m not a chill person but someone should be
I’m one minor inconvenience away from a meltdown
Every time.
Yay!
I’m convinced this is a spoof
These people obviously have no feeling in their teeth
I remember nothing
And chocolate
He really likes synth jazz
I’ll be very grumpy
I’ve heard this exact story
So donuts are a low sugar snack?
I love that movie
Someone made a joke but the company thought it was a great idea
Problem is, can’t always tell it’s wheat until it matures
Hee hee
Scooby memes incoming
They are bad pet owners
Oh no
I agree
Doesn’t Velma always say something about it not be supernatural? Until Sam and Dean showed up.
Just makes me laugh
Cat nipple tassels
They start Summerween now
The best thing to come out of Mexico (or wherever)
Poor babies!
Bring a mom of anything
OMG
Haha
Sherlock’s got nothing on me
I’d just bbq them
Vegetables aren’t real anyway
I’m very mean to myself
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake

item.title: You won’t like this post, it’s not spicy enough
item.dc:creator: NegasonicAdultEMP
